# Ronit Raj

> Full-Stack AI & ML Engineer and Open Source Maintainer - I build production AI end-to-end, from training and serving models (GRPO on AMD MI300X, vision-language RAG) to the full-stack apps around them.

Ronit Raj is a full-stack AI & ML engineer and open-source maintainer. He maintains GitMesh, a Linux Foundation Decentralized Trust (LFDT) lab project for AI-agent governance, and speaks at Open Source Summit India 2026 (Linux Foundation, Mumbai). He builds production AI systems end-to-end - NHA × IISc PM-JAY Runner-Up for STG claim adjudication, the ClauseMark verified-evidence engine for the UN Digital Trade hackathon, GRPO fine-tuning on AMD MI300X, and a 79%-OCR military RAG (Smart India Hackathon 2024 Winner). He co-founded Garudex Labs and has 9 hackathon wins/podiums.

## Key facts
- Role: Full-Stack AI & ML Engineer · Open Source Maintainer
- Location: India
- Education: B.Tech Mathematics & Scientific Computing, IIIT Gwalior (2023–2027), CGPA 8.35
- Credentials: SIH 2024 Winner · NHA × IISc PM-JAY Runner-Up · OSS India 2026 Speaker · GitMesh (LFDT) Maintainer
- Focus: LLM fine-tuning (GRPO/LoRA), RAG, AI infrastructure & LLM serving, full-stack AI apps
- Site: https://roniii.vercel.app

## Featured projects
- [GitMesh](https://github.com/LF-Decentralized-Trust-labs/gitmesh) - Policy-as-Code engine for open-source AI-agent orchestration. A Linux Foundation Decentralized Trust (LFDT) lab project (140★); multi-agent orchestration runtime + governed MCP server, OPA policy-as-code, GitHub/GitLab sync, audit log. Co-maintainer. (TypeScript, MCP, OPA, Docker)
- [PM-JAY Claim Adjudication](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/pmjay-adjudication) - Automated STG compliance for Ayushman Bharat. NHA × IISc Runner-Up (~0.77 F1); dual Gemma 3 12B VLM pass per page across four PM-JAY packages. (Gemma 3 12B, PyMuPDF, Python)
- [ClauseMark](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/regulatory-intelligence-engine) - Verified Regulatory Evidence Engine for UN Digital Trade (RDTII). 15-package hexagonal Python monorepo; LangGraph + BGE-M3/Qdrant hybrid retrieval + 4-gate verification + RAGAS eval; span-ID citations, HITL. (Python, LangGraph, Qdrant, FastAPI)
- [PARAM](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/param) - Blockchain academic-credential platform for ABV-IIITM Gwalior. ERC-721 transcripts/degrees on Base Sepolia, 30+ Prisma models, BullMQ workers, public verification; production pilot. (Next.js 16, Express 5, Prisma, Solidity)
- [SHAKTI](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/shakti) - Vision-Language RAG for military intelligence. SIH 2024 Winner; 79% OCR accuracy with cross-modal retrieval. (PyTorch, RAG, OCR, FastAPI)
- [InferenceGym](https://github.com/Ronit-Raj9/InferenceGym) - OpenEnv RL environment for LLM inference serving (batching, KV-cache, speculative decoding, prefill/decode split). Reference PPO agent beats hand-tuned heuristics. (Python, PyTorch, PPO, vLLM)
- [QuantumScribe](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/quantumscribe) - OpenEnv RL environment for LLM quantum error correction. Qwen2.5-3B decodes surface-code syndromes with Stim-verified rewards; 96.4% logical correction. (GRPO, LoRA, Unsloth, Stim)
- [AlphaQ](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/alphaq-minesweeper) - GRPO-trained RL agent (Qwen2.5-14B) for Minesweeper on AMD Instinct MI300X (192GB HBM3); AMD Special Mention. (PyTorch, GRPO, LoRA, ROCm)
- [GitGambit](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/gitgambit) - Unified GitHub profile/PR/diff analytics with external-work-first scoring. (Next.js 16, Drizzle, GraphQL)
- [iONIA Platform](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/ionia) - AI-powered competitive-exam prep; NTA-replica adaptive testing + OCR handwritten-answer assessment; 50+ active students. (Next.js, FastAPI, MongoDB)
- [GraphRec Social Recommender](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/recommendation-system-gnn) - From-scratch PyTorch GraphRec (attention GNN) for social recommendation on Epinions; dual item-space + social-space aggregation. (PyTorch, Graph Neural Networks)
- [GeneTrust AI Studio](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/genetrust) - AI CRISPR platform; DNABERT analysis via FastAPI + RAG, on-chain provenance; HackHazards '25 Winner (800+ projects). (PyTorch, DNABERT, RAG)
- [AISEHack PM2.5 Forecasting](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/aisehack-pm25-forecasting) - Episode-aware country-scale air-pollution forecasting; 0.8384 leaderboard, finalists at IIIT Hyderabad. (PyTorch, FNO, ConvLSTM)
- [LegalEase](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/legalease) - AI legal-compliance & tax automation for Indian SMEs; 6 specialized agents, Base on-chain notarization; Trillion Dollar GenAI 2nd place. (Next.js, FastAPI, LangChain)
- [ZeroKeyCLI](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/zerokey) - x402 micropayment "AdSense for the terminal" on Monad. (Node.js, Solidity, x402)
- [Aadhaar-Zero](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/aadhaar-zero) - Privacy-preserving KYC with ZK proofs (Groth16) on Base Sepolia; CSIC 1.0 Stage III shortlist. (Solidity, snarkjs, Circom)
- [TypeNad](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/typenad) - Competitive on-chain typing arena on Monad with staking. (Next.js, Monad, Solidity)
- [HealthBooker](https://roniii.vercel.app/projects/healthbooker) - Blockchain medical records; AES-256 on IPFS, Ethereum access control. (React, Ethereum, IPFS, Solidity)

- UN Global Hackathon - Digital Trade Regulatory Analysis (ClauseMark / RDTII) (2026)

- Monad Blitz New Delhi - 4th Place (2026)
- AMD AI RL Hackathon - Special Mention (IIT Delhi) (2026)
- ANRF AISEHack Phase 2 - Finalists at IIIT Hyderabad (2026)
- Trillion Dollar GenAI Hackathon - 2nd Place + 3 awards (IIT Bhubaneswar) (2025)
- HackHazards '25 - Winner (1st of 800+ projects) (2025)
- Best Startup Pitch - AICTE IDE 2025 (Garudex Labs) (2025)
- Smart India Hackathon 2024 - Winner (military RAG-MLLM, 79% OCR) (2024)

## Experience
- Maintainer @ GitMesh (Nov 2024 – Present) - Co-maintainer of an LFDT AI-agent governance platform; policy-as-code, MCP, audit logging; 130+ stars.
- Software Engineer Intern @ C3iHub, IIT Kanpur (May 2025 – Aug 2025) - Built and shipped PARAM, a blockchain academic-credential platform, to production pilot.
- Full-Stack Developer @ Ionia (Dec 2024 – Jun 2025) - End-to-end online testing infrastructure; 50+ active students.
- Co-Founder & Lead Developer @ Zentoro AI (Nov 2024 – Mar 2025) - Autonomous multi-agent project-execution engine; 700+ visitors from 44 countries.
- Co-Founder @ Garudex Labs (Nov 2024 – Mar 2025) - AI product for the government sector; won the Government of India's national IDE'25 award.

## Skills
- AI/ML: PyTorch, Transformers, RAG, Reinforcement Learning (PPO, GRPO), LoRA, PEFT, Unsloth, TRL, LangChain, LangGraph, Graph Neural Networks, Recommender Systems
- AI Infra & MLOps: Hugging Face, vLLM, Docker, ROCm, MCP (Model Context Protocol), Weights & Biases, GitHub Actions
- Python: NumPy, Pandas, Pydantic, FastAPI, Flask, OpenCV
- Web: Next.js, React, Node.js, Express, GraphQL, WebSocket, React Native, Tailwind
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase, Prisma, Drizzle, Neo4j, SQLite, Pinecone, FAISS, Qdrant, ChromaDB
- Blockchain: Solidity, ethers.js, Foundry, Base
- Cloud: AWS, Vercel, Cloudflare
- Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, C/C++, HTML, CSS
